story.text: As the owner steering ambient operations soon to come online, I need the loop's quality standard captured as a generative, capability-indexed, self-updating manual rather than a frozen catalog of golden runs — because ambient ops must imagine-and-compare against 'smooth operation of the teeth' in cases never seen, and a stored exemplar rots the moment it is frozen (the freshness failure). The capture hoists the exemplar/notoriety poles (the manual is the generative type; an exemplar is one instance of it), and — the teeth — it names the feedback-loop hazard a self-updating standard creates (the bar becomes a mirror) and breaks it with airgaps and insulations: AG-2 (capability-admission ⊥ standard-update) was pressure-tested by an independent three-skeptic panel, found to LEAK against patient/temporal laundering, and repaired (IN-1 must track BLESSED capability via a pass-receipt, not merely EXERCISED capability) with a verdict-flip-without-work detector giving it teeth. It carries the bounded self-heal litmus (heal inside the owner-stamped bound, never by moving the bound to stop refusals). Value: the design that lets a standard meet expectation based on capability without the judged corrupting the judge survives this mortal session and becomes loop-visible work, instead of dying as uncommitted prose in a shared viewport.

_note: Re-homed to epic.the-field by bdo's steering (2026-06-19): the field's self-knowledge of whether its own gates bite honestly (the standard, the bite axis, the airgaps that stop the judged corrupting the judge). Originally drafted for epic.landing-throughput-response — the gateway-economy arc, still unlanded/scattered WIP, never metabolized into the loop — and carries forward that arc's exemplars/notorieties design. Pressure-tested 2026-06-18 by a diverge-judge panel: AG-2 leaked, the fix (track blessed not exercised capability + the verdict-flip detector) is on the record in the proposal. The fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5); this file is the announced unit.
